meaning: 扬克斯[美国纽约州东南部城市]
examples: He was a salesman in Yonkers.
New Rochelle was coached by Dan o 'brien, Yonkers by Les Beck.
They were married in Yonkers, and a week later they went to a resort upstate.
Here in New York, the same applies to Howes Cave, Coeymans Hollow, Watkins Glen and Yonkers.
Thom was killed Friday when she crashed her motorcycle on a highway in Yonkers, New York.
